capabilities: Define and utilize a consistent seed prompt to ensure stable and reproducible AI-generated outputs.

procedure.action: Capture the initial prompt requirements using a structured template to ensure completeness using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Assert the prompt against a set of predefined criteria to ensure clarity and relevance by asserting all required fields conform to the schema definition; emit VALIDATION_FAILED with field path on the first failing field; assert field_validation_pass_rate >= 1.0.

Draft a clear and concise seed prompt using the validated requirements using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Inspect the seed prompt with domain experts to ensure it meets the intended objectives by applying the checklist line by line; assert mandatory_item_fail_count < 1; log review_duration_ms and reviewer_id to review_log.

Document the final seed prompt in a version-controlled repository for traceability using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Invoke the exact seed prompt in all relevant AI model interactions to maintain consistency by invoking the target API with the specified parameters; assert response_status < 400 and response_time_ms < 5000; log request_id and response_code.

summary: A seed prompt acts as a fixed starting point, reducing variability in AI responses by providing a stable context. This technique is essential for reproducible results and controlled experimentation in prompt engineering.
title: Establishing Seed Prompt for Consistent AI Output

failureConditions: Inconsistent AI outputs across different runs; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.

Difficulty in reproducing results for experiments; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
Increased variability in AI response quality; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
metrics: the prompt against a set of predefined criteria to ensure clarity and relevance by asserting all required fields conform
successConditions: Check that the seed prompt is stored in a version-controlled system
Verify that AI outputs remain consistent across multiple runs with the same seed
Ensure that the seed prompt is reviewed and approved by domain experts
